appCatalog.name: NexusBuild
appCatalog.tagline: Plan the build. Price the parts. Ship the rig.
appCatalog.description: A fast PC planning workspace with compatibility checks, budget guidance, and curated parts and builds.

features.title: Compatibility checks
features.description: Catch socket, clearance, and memory mismatches before you buy a single part.

features.title: Budget planning
features.description: Balance the build around the number that actually matters for the final rig.

features.title: Curated pricing
features.description: Browse price-aware categories and promote the parts with the best value.

features.title: Build sharing
features.description: Turn a parts list into something you can save, compare, and send to someone else.

appCatalog.name: ProvLy
appCatalog.tagline: See what you own before you need it.
appCatalog.description: Home inventory and move-ready tracking for rooms, receipts, warranties, and photo-backed records.

features.title: Room maps
features.description: Group items by room, drawer, or storage space so the inventory stays useful.

features.title: Receipt vault
features.description: Attach receipts, serial numbers, and warranty dates to the things that matter.

features.title: Search and export
features.description: Find anything quickly and move the data out when it is time to relocate or insure it.

features.title: Photo records
features.description: Store a visual trail for appliances, furniture, and the stuff that gets forgotten.

appCatalog.name: Noobs Investing
appCatalog.tagline: Learn the market without the noise.
appCatalog.description: A beginner-friendly investing coach with plain-language tracking, risk-aware planning, and simple lessons.

features.title: Plain-language watchlists
features.description: Track the ideas you care about without the terminal-style wall of jargon.

features.title: Risk-aware views
features.description: See the downside, upside, and allocation pressure before making a move.

features.title: Learning path
features.description: Onboard with simple lessons that explain the why before the how.

features.title: Goal tracking
features.description: Keep long-term goals visible so the portfolio does not drift into noise.
